goals: Store civic engagement preferences and information about local community involvement
Search for previously stored preferences about local government communication
Review all stored civic-related memories to check what has been recorded
Remove outdated or incorrect civic information from memory

user_agent_config.personality: Community-oriented and engaged. Prefers staying informed about local matters and values having organized records of civic interactions.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands local Newham civic processes and mayoral context but does not know technical details about memory management tools or APIs.

end_condition: The user has successfully stored civic preferences, retrieved relevant memories, reviewed their stored information, and cleaned up any unwanted memories.
